hassio_confirm.title: TellStick Local detected
hassio_confirm.description:
The **{addon}** app is running and ready.

It will connect on **{host}** (command port **{command_port}**, event port **{event_port}**).

Click **Submit** to set up TellStick Local.

user.title: Connect to TellStick daemon
user.description: Enter the host and port of the TellStick Local app.

confirm_rf_device.title: New 433 MHz device detected

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the TellStick daemon. Check that the app is running and the host/ports are correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This TellStick daemon is already configured.
abort.device_added: Device added successfully! It will appear in your device list.
abort.entry_not_found: TellStick Local integration not found. Please set it up first.

user.title: Add a device
user.description: Pick your device type and give it a name.

params.title: Device parameters
params.description: Enter the parameters for **{device_type}**. Ranges and defaults match the hardware.

confirm.title: Send pairing signal
confirm.description:
**{name}** ({protocol}/{model}) will learn house code **{house}**, unit **{unit}**.

Put your 433 MHz receiver in **learn mode** now, then click **Submit** — the pairing signal is sent immediately.

error.invalid_code: Parameter values must not be empty.
error.teach_failed: Failed to send pairing signal. Check that the TellStick app is running.

abort.device_added: Device paired successfully! It will appear in your device list shortly.
